usage: create_relative_floorplan [-help] {{{-place <string> | -reshape <string>} [-ref <string>]} } [-place <string> {-ref_type {object core_boundary die_boundary} -horizontal_edge_separate <string> -vertical_edge_separate <string>} [[-bbox {none target reference both}] [-orient {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MY MX90 MY90}]]] [-reshape <string> { -dimension {height width} } [ [-fixed_edges <string>] [-density <string>] [-offset <string>]]]

options.name: -bbox
options.description: Specifies whether to use bounding box instead of the rectilinear shape of target or reference object. Default: none.

options.name: -density
options.description: Specifies the target utilization (TU). By default, reshaping the object will keep the current TU.

options.name: -dimension
options.description: Specifies width or height of referenced object as the reference dimension.Default: width

options.name: -fixed_edges
options.description: Specifies that the reshape object will be stretched while fixing 2 perpendicular edges.Default: {-1 0}. fixed_edges {-1 0} represents the low left corner for rectangle fplan and the origin that has smallest x,y coordinates for rectilinear fplan, the edge with index -1 is the first edge after zero edge in counter-clockwise counting.

options.name: -horizontal_edge_separate
options.description: Specifies the vertical spacing between horizontal edge of target and reference objects.

options.name: -offset
options.description: Offset value from reference object in specified dimension.

options.name: -orient
options.description: {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MY MX90 MY90} Specifies the orientation of target object.Default: R0.

options.name: -place
options.description: Specifies the target object name for relative place

options.name: -ref
options.description: Specifies the reference object name. It cannot be used with -ref_type core_boundary or -ref_type die_boundary.

options.name: -ref_type
options.description: {object core_boundary die_boundary} Specifies the type of reference. Default: object.

options.name: -reshape
options.description: Specifies the target object name for relative reshape

options.name: -vertical_edge_separate
options.description: Specifies the horizontal spacing between vertical edge of target and reference objects.
